_README: NetSuite vendor-bill push config (mirrors NetSuiteConfig in backend/src/shared/netsuite.ts). This file holds NON-SECRET values only. Credentials (accountId, clientId, certificateId, privateKeyPem, alg) live in a secrets store and are loaded at runtime as NetSuiteSecret. Single-subsidiary scaffold: leave subsidiaryId empty/null for a non-OneWorld account; set it to the subsidiary internal id for OneWorld. apAccountId = AP account internal id. defaults.expenseAccountId = line-level fallback/suspense expense account. Other defaults are internal ids applied to every line when crosswalks miss (departmentId, classId, locationId, taxCodeId; taxCodeId is SuiteTax-only). Crosswalks map extracted values to NetSuite internal ids: vendorsByTaxId/name, subsidiariesByTaxId/name for buyer legal-entity routing, accountsByCode, currenciesByCode, departmentsByCode, classesByCode, termsByName, and purchaseOrdersByNumber for PO review/matching. Empty objects mean nothing resolves and the transform emits warnings/placeholders.
